security_proposition: The endpoint monitoring disconnect was deliberately caused to impair security defences.

operational_response.note: Investigate the signal and surrounding context; no autonomous containment is justified.

must_not_assert: that a process stopped or tampered with the agent
that the endpoint itself was offline rather than the network or manager
that telemetry was deleted or defence controls were disabled

the_trap: A monitoring gap is operationally relevant, but the status record has no causal endpoint evidence.
rationale: A0 records that the endpoint monitoring agent disconnected. It provides no process, command, service-control, or network-causation evidence, so deliberate defence evasion is only one of several possible explanations.
